# Gatis Daugavietis

> Latvian designer and web developer with 18 years of experience. Brand identity, web design and print for companies that want to grow — not just look good.

## Who

- Name: Gatis Daugavietis
- Role: Designer & web developer, performance marketing lead
- Experience: 18 years (since 2008)
- Based in: Rīga, Latvia
- Languages: Latvian (native), Russian, English
- Clients in: Latvia, Lithuania, Estonia, US (Honolulu)

## Services

- Brand identity — logo, color system, typography, visual language, brand book
- Web design and development — Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind, Vercel deploy
- Print design — posters, brochures, business cards, packaging
- Design and SEO consulting — audits with prioritized recommendations

## Selected clients

- Tenter — Latvian construction company (largest portfolio)
- Estire — service company, brand and Vercel migration
- ROIS — performance marketing agency
- Box Latvia — packaging brand identity
- Apmeklē.lv — Latvian tourism platform identity
- Digitālais Dzintars — cultural digitization brand
- MLM Cargo, Tavasdurvis, ARM Metals

## Contact

- Email: gatis@rois.lv
- Phone: +371 27112163
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gatisdaugavietis/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gatisdesign/

## Approach

I ask about the business before I draw. Audience, why people aren't buying right now, where the resistance is. Design only after answers are on paper. It takes time, results are always more specific.

## Tech stack

- Web: Vite, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, react-helmet-async, vite-react-ssg, Vercel
- Print: Adobe Illustrator, InDesign, Photoshop
- SEO: GA4, Google Search Console, Microsoft Clarity
- Marketing: Meta Ads, Google Ads
